query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026 is 3,237,346 acres, with 36,594 year-to-date wildfires.**

- **Exact YTD acres:** 3,237,346 acres
- **Date:** Reported in the July 3, 2026 National Fire News report, covering the YTD period 1/1/26–7/3/26 (the latest business-day update following the late-June window). The page also references a Preparedness Level status "as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT."

This figure was cross-validated across two authoritative NIFC pages (the National Fire News page and the Statistics page), both sourced from the NICC's Incident Management Situation Report. Note that NIFC YTD figures are operational and revised frequently as incident data is reconciled.

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Report dated July 3, 2026. Year-to-date 2026 (1/1/26-7/03/26): Fires 36,594; Acres burned 3,237,346. Preparedness Level as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT.

sources.title: Statistics | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Year-to-date Wildfires 36,594 Incidents; Year-to-date Acres Burned 3,237,346 Acres; Acres Burned on Large Fires 605,152; Large Fires Being Suppressed 41.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR)
